learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Your SPIKE story starts with you
learn.summary: Understand why you are here and what you want to build.
bullets: AIA, Agency, and SPIKE — the journey from employee to business owner
Ambition, impact, and values as the foundation of your practice
How Week 1 connects to your Dream Board and squad workshops
learn.callout: Read before your classroom session. Your coach will expand on these themes live.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: In-class: Identity & squad formation
workshop.summary: Facilitated activities with your cohort and squad.
bullets: Share your name, agency, and one personal goal for RA-SPIKE
Meet your squad and agree on how you will work together
Facilitator-led reflection on ambition and purpose
workshop.callout: Mark complete after your classroom session.

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Create your Dream Board
assignment.summary: Visualize the life and business you are building toward.
bullets: Add photos across lifestyle, family, career, and financial goals
Write a short caption for each image
Include at least the minimum cards required to submit

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What did you discover about yourself?
reflection.summary: Capture insights before you submit the week.
prompts: What surprised you when building your Dream Board?
What is one strength you will bring to your squad?
What is one question you still have about your path?

submit.label: Submit
submit.headline: Mark Week 1 complete
submit.summary: Confirm you finished Learn, Workshop, Assignment, and Reflection.
bullets: Your Dream Board is saved to your profile
Bring one Dream Board insight to your next squad huddle
